headline: A Look At Fortinet (FTNT) Valuation As Analyst Upgrades And Earnings Outlook Lift Sentiment
summary: Recent analyst estimate upgrades and rising expectations for earnings and revenue have put Fortinet (FTNT) in focus, especially as the stock has outperformed a weaker technology sector while it approaches its next financial results update. See our latest analysis for Fortinet. Fortinet’s recent conference appearances around cybersecurity and AI, combined with interest ahead of its May 6 earnings call, sit alongside a 90 day share price return of 5.97% and a 1 year total shareholder return...
